# COME AS YOU WERE

A premium fictionalized limited series package inspired by the cultural fallout around the death of a generation-defining music icon.

## Core positioning
- Prestige thriller / drama
- 6-part limited series
- Rights-aware fictionalization
- Built for producers, financiers, managers, attorneys, and packaging partners

## Primary pages
- / : public package overview
- /docs/package-brief.html : fast package brief
- /docs/call-sheet.html : live-call talking points
- /docs/investor-faq.html : investor and producer FAQ

## Summary
The project is designed as a commercial, packageable premium series rather than a literal allegation piece. The dramatic engine is the difference between what happened, what people believe happened, and what the machinery around fame needed people to believe.
